step_by_step_thinking: I agree with the initial assessment but would add another point. During vaginal hysterectomies, there can be significant variability in identifying the exact location of the ureters due to limited visibility and reliance on palpation alone. This makes it particularly challenging to navigate safely around these delicate structures. Therefore, my agreement stands firm with an additional emphasis on the inherent difficulty in accurately locating the ureters during vaginally performed hysterectomies.
